---
ID: US-OLV-021
Title: Edit account client company on card
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a account manager
I want to edit the full client company directly from portfolio cards
So that the portfolio can preserve short names and full legal names

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Portfolio cards expose client_company as an editable field.
- [ ] Blur saves the changed client company to Supabase.
- [ ] Editing the field does not trigger card navigation.

Notes: Added after the initial portfolio migration.
